titleStmt.title: SII 34.337: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 337. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the entrance, left side, to the first prākāra of the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājādhirāja II, 2nd year, Makara, 7th day, Monday, Svāti = A.D. 1165.

Edirilāpperumāḷ alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-Kaḍambarāyaṉ, an araiyan of Chār in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍa-chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu gave a village called Neḍuṅgīraikkuḍi in the same kūṟṟam as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna of the temple of Tirupperumāṉāṇḍār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOvirājakEcari panmarāṉa tripuvaṉa
ccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājādhirāja devaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa cō
vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakōnāṭṭu Uṟattūṟ kūṟṟattu U
ṭaiyār tirupperumānāṇṭārkku Innāṭṭik kūṟṟa
ttu cāraraiyan tanṉaṉ Etirilāpperumāḷāṉa ko
lōttuṅka cōḻak kaṭamparāyanēn makaranāyaṟṟu Ē
ḻān tiyatiyāṉa tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
cōtināḷ Ittirupperumāḷāṇṭāṟku tirukkai
malaril nān nīrvārtta kuṭikkāṭu Iṉ nāṭṭik kū
ṟṟattu neṭuṅkīraikkuṭi Iṟaiyiliḻiccip pu
ravil curukki kuṭinīṅkāt tēvatāṉamāvatāka I
nneṭuṅkīraikkuṭi perunāṉ kellaiyuḷ
Ittēvaṟku kuṭinīṅkāt tēvatāṉamākkik kuṭut
tēn tanṉan Etirilāp perumāḷāṉa kolō
ttuṅka cōḻak kaṭamparāyanēṉ §
Digital edition of SII 34.337 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
